zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne van Chimay於1502年3月4日出生在比利時海瑙特蒙斯時，她的父親Charles Croy- Chimay47歲，母親Louise d'Albret33歲。她於1520年8月30日與Philippe de Croÿ II結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1568年5月15日在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特迪斯特享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne van Chimay于1502年3月4日出生在比利时海瑙特蒙斯时，她的父亲Charles Croy- Chimay47岁，母亲Louise d'Albret33岁。她于1520年8月30日与Philippe de Croÿ II结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1568年5月15日在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特迪斯特享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Chimay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Amerindian (Mexico): from the root of Nahuatl (Aztec) chimalli ‘shield’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne van Chimay was born on 4 March 1502, in Mons, Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Charles Croy- Chimay, was 47 and her mother, Louise d'Albret, was 33. She married Philippe de Croÿ II on 30 August 1520. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 15 May 1568, in Diest, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne van Chimay est née le 4 mars 1502, à Mons, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Charles Croy- Chimay, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Louise d'Albret, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Philippe de Croÿ II le 30 août 1520. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 mai 1568, à Diest, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne van Chimay am 4. März 1502 in Mons, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Charles Croy- Chimay 47 und ihre Mutter Louise d'Albret 33. Sie hat am 30. August 1520 Philippe de Croÿ II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. Mai 1568 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Diest, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne van Chimay è nata il il 4 marzo 1502 nel Mons, Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Charles Croy- Chimay, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Louise d'Albret, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Philippe de Croÿ II il 30 agosto 1520. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 maggio 1568, nel Diest, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne van Chimayが1502年3月4日にベルギーヘイナトモンスで生まれた時，父Charles Croy- Chimayは47歳，母Louise d'Albretは33歳であった。1520年8月30日にPhilippe de Croÿ IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1568年5月15日にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントディエストで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne van Chimay(이)가 1502년 3월 4일 벨기에 하인오트 몬스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles Croy- Chimay(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Louise d'Albret(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1520년 8월 30일 Philippe de Croÿ II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1568년 5월 15일 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 디스트에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne van Chimay nasceu em 4 de março de 1502, em Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Charles Croy- Chimay, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Louise d'Albret, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Philippe de Croÿ II em 30 de agosto de 1520. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 15 de maio de 1568, em Diest, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne van Chimay родилась 4 марта 1502 г. в местности монс, ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Charles Croy- Chimay было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Louise d'Albret, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philippe de Croÿ II 30 августа 1520 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 мая 1568 г. в местности диест, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne van Chimay nació el 4 de marzo de 1502, en Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Charles Croy- Chimay, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Louise d'Albret, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Philippe de Croÿ II el 30 de agosto de 1520. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1568, en Diest, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, a la edad de 66 años.
